query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) AS projetos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE loginMethod = 'manual') AS clientes_manuais,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actions) AS tarefas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM briefings) AS briefings,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM riskMatrix) AS matrizes_risco,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM actionPlans) AS planos_acao,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS total_usuarios;
